rationale: MR-* rules have a top-level suppress-flag convention; the capture-reachability check (ENH-1961) has none, so reviewed false positives (e.g. autodev's BUG-2744 runtime-guard case) can only be silenced via a test-file allowlist that ll-loop run never consults.
rule: Captured: Suppress flag for capture-reachability validator warning
